The Strategic Problem

OEMs Lose Visibility After the First Sale

Luxury manufacturers face a structural challenge. Once a vehicle leaves the primary dealer network, manufacturers lose critical control and visibility into the secondary market — creating strategic blind spots that limit revenue optimisation. This is especially critical for premium brands: Range Rover, Defender, and Jaguar performance vehicles.

📊  Pricing Transparency

No visibility into actual resale values and real-time market pricing dynamics. OEMs cannot optimise residual value programmes or detect grey-market arbitrage undermining brand positioning.

🌏  Global Demand Channels

Unable to capture cross-border demand opportunities efficiently. Premium brands like Range Rover and Defender command significant price premiums in Asian markets that manufacturers cannot currently access.

🏷️  Resale Ecosystem Control

Loss of brand control in secondary and export markets. Without a verified distribution layer, vehicles flow through uncontrolled intermediaries — damaging pricing integrity and CPO programme value.

🔄  Secondary Market Blind Spot

Asian dealers source heavily from UK but operate outside manufacturer visibility — depriving OEMs of data on pricing trends, demand signals, and brand perception across the fastest-growing luxury markets.

Market Opportunity

Strong Asian Demand for UK Premium Vehicles

UK-imported vehicles carry heritage and prestige value that commands a significant premium across Asia — while local supply remains structurally limited.

👑

Perceived Prestige

UK-imported vehicles carry premium brand heritage appeal that local-market equivalents cannot replicate. Range Rover, Defender, and Jaguar are aspirational symbols across Malaysian and broader ASEAN markets.

📦

Limited Local Supply

Restricted availability of authentic UK-spec vehicles creates genuine scarcity. Import regulations and tariff structures make verified UK-sourced inventory a premium, hard-to-access commodity.

💹

Price Arbitrage Opportunity

Significant retail pricing differentials favour UK imports. Buyers in Malaysia and the wider region are willing to pay a meaningful premium for verified UK provenance — creating strong unit economics for the platform.

🇲🇾

Malaysia — Key Gateway Market

Malaysia is a critical entry point for premium vehicle distribution across South-East Asia. Vehicle imports are managed through organisations such as PEKEMA, which controls the Approved Permit (AP) system — a structured, regulated import network with institutional scale.

Market Timing

Three Converging Forces. One Window.

The conditions for a category-defining platform have never been more aligned.

01

Classic Cars as Alternative Assets

The global collector car market has consistently outperformed traditional asset classes. Institutional and HNW demand is surging — but infrastructure for digital ownership is absent.

02

The UK–Asia Trade Surge

ASEAN demand for European luxury and collector vehicles is accelerating sharply. Dealers across Malaysia, Singapore, and Indonesia scale UK imports — but lack financing and trust infrastructure.

03

RWA Tokenization Goes Mainstream

Real-world asset tokenization has moved from concept to institutional reality. Regulatory frameworks are emerging. The infrastructure moment for tokenized collector vehicles is now.

No competitor currently bridges marketplace, secure escrow, cross-border financing, and tokenized ownership. The Drive is first to market with a complete solution.

Active discussions are underway. Representatives connected to the PEKEMA network have engaged regarding supplying UK vehicles to their members through the platform.

The Platform

Three-Layer Architecture for Automotive Assets

🏪Layer 1

Digital Vehicle Marketplace

Global listing platform for vehicles from dealers, collectors, fleets, and certified programmes — including JLR CPO. Verified provenance, transparent pricing, and secure cross-border settlement.

🔐
🔗Layer 2

Tokenized Ownership Layer

Blockchain-based fractionalization enabling vehicles to be divided into tradable digital shares. Built on Ethereum and Polygon for transparent ownership verification, immutable provenance records, and fast settlement.

💰
🏦Layer 3

Financial Infrastructure

Vehicle-backed lending, liquidity pools, and collateralised financing products. Enables dealers, importers, and investors to unlock capital from automotive assets — a new financial product class built on real-world assets.

⚡Blockchain

Built on Ethereum & Polygon

Transparent Ownership
Immutable records verify vehicle provenance and history
Fast Settlement
Smart contracts reduce settlement from days to minutes
Fractional Trading
Whole vehicle and tokenized fractional ownership models
Global Access
24/7 trading from anywhere with decentralised infrastructure
Strategic Value — JLR

Strategic Value for Jaguar Land Rover

For JLR, this represents a new digital distribution layer for the secondary market — connecting mature UK supply with Asian demand while restoring manufacturer visibility.

📊Data & Control

Secondary Market Visibility

Gain real-time insight into global trading activity, pricing trends, and demand signals for JLR vehicles across all markets — ending the visibility black hole after first sale.

📈Brand Value

Increased Residual Values

Enhanced liquidity and price transparency support stronger resale values — improving total cost of ownership for buyers and strengthening the JLR premium proposition globally.

🌏Distribution

Asian Market Penetration

Direct digital distribution channel to verified import networks like PEKEMA — bypassing traditional intermediaries and giving JLR structured access to the fastest-growing luxury vehicle markets.

🏆CPO Expansion

Certified Pre-Owned at Scale

JLR-certified pre-owned vehicles reach international buyers directly through verified digital channels — expanding CPO programme reach without new physical infrastructure investment.

Product

Phase 1 Is Live. Right Now.

Not a prototype. Not a mockup. A fully deployed, production-grade platform accessible today.

● Live Phase 1 Complete
Frontend — the-drive-web3.netlify.app
API — the-drive-api.onrender.com
Database — Supabase PostgreSQL (hosted)
Coverage — 17 vehicles across USA, UK & Asia

Deployed Features

✅  JWT auth & role-based access (Buyer / Dealer / Banker / Admin)
✅  Full vehicle CRUD with multi-image upload (up to 10/listing)
✅  Advanced search: price, year, mileage, fuel, transmission, location
✅  Mobile-first responsive design with debounced real-time filters
✅  Smart contracts written — VehicleEscrow.sol (OpenZeppelin)
✅  Audit logging, rate limiting & security headers

Tech Stack

Next.js 14 TypeScript Node.js / Express PostgreSQL Solidity OpenZeppelin RainbowKit / Wagmi Supabase
Supply Network

Unlocking the UK's Premium Vehicle Supply

The UK maintains a large pool of high-quality used premium vehicles ready for international distribution — representing immediate inventory for Asian markets.

🏢

Dealer Networks

Franchise and independent dealer trade-in inventory — including certified JLR approved dealers with quality-graded part-exchange stock entering the market every month.

Active Onboarding
🚐

Fleet Operators

Corporate and rental fleet end-of-lease vehicles in excellent condition. Regular, predictable supply of well-maintained premium inventory with full service documentation.

High Volume
📋

Leasing Companies

Off-lease premium vehicles returning from personal and business contract hire agreements. Typically 2–4 years old with low mileage — ideal quality profile for export markets.

Consistent Pipeline
✅

JLR Certified Pre-Owned

JLR-approved vehicles with manufacturer warranty and quality standards — the highest trust tier for international buyers seeking verified UK provenance and brand-backed assurance.

Brand-Verified

The platform acts as a digital export marketplace — channelling structured UK supply directly to verified Asian demand.

Business Model

Five Revenue Streams. Sustainable Platform Economics.

Diversified model combining marketplace fees, subscriptions, and financial products. At scale, the platform functions as both marketplace and financial infrastructure layer.

Revenue Source Example Business Model
📣  Vehicle Transaction Fees Marketplace trades 2–3% of transaction value
📋  Dealer Subscriptions Inventory listing Monthly / annual SaaS fees
🔗  Token Trading Fees Exchange activity 0.5–1% of token trades
🏦  Vehicle Financing Interest income Spread on lending products
🏢  Custody & Storage Asset services Storage & verification fees

The moat is the combination. Any single feature is replicable. The complete ecosystem — marketplace + escrow + financing + tokenization + ASEAN infrastructure — is not.

Tokenization

From Physical Asset to Financial Instrument

Blockchain enables new ownership and financing structures that transform vehicles into tradable financial assets — creating a new asset class accessible to a global investor base.

🔒

Traditional Model

Limited

Vehicle sales require full ownership transfer and complete capital commitment. Illiquid assets, slow settlement, limited investor participation, and no secondary market for partial stakes.

↓ Tokenization Layer ↓
🔓

Tokenized Model

Unlocked

Blockchain enables new ownership and financing structures that transform vehicles into tradable financial assets — accessible from anywhere, 24/7.

🧩

Fractional Ownership

Divide high-value vehicles into affordable investment shares. Opens premium automotive assets to a global pool of retail and institutional investors.

👥

Investor Participation

Enable portfolio-level investment in automotive assets without physical custody requirements — new exposure for family offices, funds, and retail investors.

🤝

Collateralised Lending

Unlock liquidity through vehicle-backed loans for dealers and importers — using tokenized assets as verifiable, on-chain collateral for new financial products.

Roadmap

Four Strategic Phases to Global Exchange

01

Phase 1 — Launch ✓ COMPLETE

Launch marketplace platform. Tokenize initial vehicle inventory. Establish UK dealer partnerships.

Live
02

Phase 2 — UK Dealer & PEKEMA Integration

UK dealer network onboarding, PEKEMA member access, cross-border logistics setup, secure escrow settlement, Asian market distribution channels

Q2–Q3 2026
03

Phase 3 — Vehicle-Backed Financing

Vehicle-backed lending markets, liquidity pools, collateralised financing products for dealers and importers, institutional financing infrastructure

2027
04

Phase 4 — Full Global Exchange

Full global automotive asset exchange, secondary token markets, fractional ownership at scale, international expansion beyond Malaysia into wider ASEAN and Middle East

Q4 2026

Dealer Onboarding & ASEAN
25%

Operations & Team

PEKEMA onboarding complete — Malaysian dealer network live
100+ active dealer accounts across UK and ASEAN

Path to Series A

$10M GMV + 100 dealer accounts + ASEAN infrastructure live + smart contract escrow proven = Series A at significantly higher valuation. The $5M seed is the unlock.

Why InMotion Ventures

Perfect Alignment with InMotion's Investment Thesis

InMotion Ventures focuses on future mobility ecosystems. This platform directly targets every core investment theme — and offers JLR a strategic equity position in the infrastructure it helped create.

🏪

Digital Automotive Marketplaces

Next-generation trading infrastructure for vehicle assets. The Drive is the missing digital distribution layer for the JLR secondary market — globally scalable, data-rich, and purpose-built for premium automotive. Early participation allows JLR to shape the infrastructure of the future automotive secondary market.

🔗

Asset Tokenization

Blockchain-enabled ownership and fractional investment models. The Drive's tokenization layer creates a new asset class — vehicles as investable, tradeable digital instruments — directly aligned with InMotion's Web3 and mobility fintech thesis.

💳

Mobility Fintech

Financial products leveraging automotive assets as collateral. Vehicle-backed lending, liquidity pools, and collateralised financing represent a new fintech category — with JLR inventory as the foundational asset base.

🌐

Global Vehicle Distribution

Cross-border logistics and demand-supply optimisation. The UK-to-Malaysia corridor through PEKEMA is the proof-of-concept for a scalable global distribution layer — connecting OEM supply with structured institutional demand across Asia.

Early participation allows JLR to shape the infrastructure of the future automotive secondary market — the standards, data rails, and distribution channels every OEM will depend on.
